description: RimWorld colony telemetry — powered by the OtelExporter mod. Dusty Indigo edition.
title: ⚔ RimWorld Colony

panels.title: Free Colonists
panels.description: Colonists free to work and fight.

panels.title: Food Supply
panels.description: Estimated days of nutrition remaining at current consumption rate.

panels.title: Silver
panels.description: Silver in stockpile — your trading currency.

panels.title: Threat Points
panels.description: Storyteller threat budget. Higher = nastier raids incoming.

panels.title: Colonist Mood
panels.description: Mood level per colonist (0–1). Dashed lines show average minor/major/extreme break thresholds.

panels.title: Health & Pain
panels.description: Current health (green) and pain (red) per colonist.

panels.title: Negative Thoughts per Colonist
panels.description: Number of active negative mood memories per colonist. High counts indicate morale risk.

panels.title: Hediff Breakdown (Colony)
panels.description: Total health conditions across all colonists by category.

panels.title: Colonist Needs — Food & Rest
panels.description: Key need levels over time. Below 0.1 = critical.

panels.title: Stockpile by Category
panels.description: Total item count in stockpile, grouped by category.

panels.title: Stockpile Composition
panels.description: Current stockpile split by category.

panels.title: Silver over Time
panels.description: Silver stockpile trend.

panels.title: Silver & Threat Points
panels.description: Silver stockpile vs storyteller threat budget.

panels.title: Power Grid — Production vs Consumption
panels.description: Watts produced and consumed across all power grids. Net > 0 = surplus.

panels.title: Battery Storage
panels.description: Battery charge level per power grid (stored / max).

panels.title: Fires
panels.description: Active fires on the map. Any > 0 is an emergency.

panels.title: Filth
panels.description: Filth tiles on the map. High filth reduces mood.

panels.title: Growing Season
panels.description: Spring or Summer = active growing season.

panels.title: Temperature History
panels.description: Outdoor temperature over time.

panels.title: Room Temperatures
panels.description: Temperature sample per room role type.

panels.title: Storyteller Threat Points
panels.description: Rising threat points = stronger raids. Watch for spikes after wealth growth.

panels.title: Faction Goodwill
panels.description: Current player goodwill with each faction. Negative = hostile.

panels.title: Tamed Animals
panels.description: Animals in your faction by species.

panels.title: Wild Animals on Map
panels.description: Wild (non-hostile) animals by species. Predators marked.

panels.title: Wild Predators
panels.description: Predators on the map — potential threat to colonists.

panels.title: Events by Type
panels.description: Count of logged events per type over the selected time range.

panels.title: Event Rate
panels.description: Events per minute by type.

panels.title: Colony Event Log
panels.description: Live log stream of all colony events — raids, deaths, mental breaks, research completions, trades, and relationships.

panels.title: Skill Levels by Colonist
panels.description: Latest skill level per colonist × skill. Passion: 0=none, 1=minor, 2=burning.
